reason: Node 1.1.2 has no declared dependencies, but logically it relies on node 1.1.1 (well-definedness of the map Phi). The proof uses the fact that omega_T(a) = <pi_phi(a) T xi_phi, xi_phi> defines a state, which is exactly the content established in 1.1.1. After the domain closure fix (from the other challenge), the well-definedness of omega_S for S = lambda*T_1 + (1-lambda)*T_2 in D is guaranteed by 1.1.1. Consider adding 1.1.1 as a dependency. Additionally, the inference type is marked as "assumption" but this is a derivation from properties of inner products, not an axiom or hypothesis being introduced.
